scripts.allure:web:generate: node -e "const { execSync } = require('node:child_process'); const ts = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[-:.TZ]/g,'').slice(0,14); const out = 'reports/allure-report/web/' + ts; execSync('allure generate allure-results --clean -o ' + out, { stdio: 'inherit' }); console.log('\nAllure report generated at: ' + out);"
scripts.allure:web:open: node -e "const { execSync } = require('node:child_process'); const fs = require('node:fs'); const path = require('node:path'); const base = path.join('reports','allure-report','web'); const dirs = fs.existsSync(base) ? fs.readdirSync(base, { withFileTypes: true }).filter(d => d.isDirectory() && /^\d{14}$/.test(d.name)).map(d => d.name).sort() : []; if (dirs.length === 0) { console.error('No timestamped Allure reports found. Run: npm run allure:web:generate'); process.exit(1); } const latest = dirs[dirs.length - 1]; execSync('allure open ' + path.join(base, latest), { stdio: 'inherit' });"
